Enumeration Case# kUSBPowerDuringWakeUSB3

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.8+

```
kUSBPowerDuringWakeUSB3 = 7
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usbpowerrequesttypes/kusbpowerduringwakeusb3#discussion)

This is used by the USB stack to allocate the 400mA extra for USB3, above the 500ma allocated by USB2
